title: pavonia biflora
intro: Pavonia biflora, also known as the two-flowered pavonia or wild rose mallow, is a perennial plant species native to the Americas. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, containing flavonoids and other compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pavonia biflora include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Pavonia biflora can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to promote wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate menstrual cramps.
